description_long: This is a small, rectangular cabin with a simple, compact structure and a dark brown gable roof. The walls are light-colored, likely made of wood or a similar material, and the roof appears to be constructed from dark shingles or tiles. The cabin features a single, centered door on the front facade, with no visible windows on any side. The roof overhangs slightly, providing minimal shelter above the entrance. The overall design is utilitarian, with no decorative elements or additional structures such as porches or chimneys. Its modest size and straightforward form suggest it is intended for basic residential or shelter use.
description: A small, rectangular cabin with a dark gable roof and light walls, featuring a single front door and no visible windows. The design is simple and functional, with no decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the light-colored facade, dark gable roof, and a single centered door.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the gable roof and the plain side wall with no windows or features.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall, which is featureless and matches the light color of the front.
description_view_3: Angled view from the opposite side, again showing the gable roof and plain wall with no openings.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate pitch, covered in dark shingles
attribute_window_arrangement: No visible windows on any side; all facades appear solid and windowless
attribute_door_placement: Single exterior door centered on the front facade
